sections_cited: section 7A of Sindh Building Control Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-4486 of 2024 Syed Noman Hassan Versus Province of Sindh & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of Misc. No.19875/24 3. For hearing of Misc. No.19876/24 4. For hearing of main case. Dated: 12.03.2025 Mr. Sohail Hameed for petitioner. Ms. Humaira Jatoi, Assistant Advocate General. -.-.- Learned counsel for the petitioner has moved a complaint to D.G. Sindh Building Control Authority on 03.09.2024 in connection with action under section 7A of Sindh Building Control Ordinance, 1979 against illegal construction on Plot No.A-58, A-59, Block 13-C, Street No.4, Gulshan-e-Iqbal, Karachi. Learned counsel for Sindh Building Control Authority states that although she has copy of the complaint, there is no receiving on it on the part of Sindh Building Control Authority. Be that as it may, copy of the complaint, which is available at pages 31-33 of the file, shall be sent to the D.G. Sindh Building Control Authority who after giving a chance of hearing to the petitioner and any affected party to pass a speaking order in accordance with law and thereafter take action under the law, if so required, within four months of this order. A copy of this order shall be sent to D.G. Sindh Building Control Authority for compliance. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms along with listed applications. Head of Const. Benches Judge
